item.title:
jamierkennedy: Jamie Kennedy @jamierkennedy · 12min How Rory McIlroy won the Masters.
From a young prodigy, lapping the field with hi
item.description:
Jamie Kennedy @jamierkennedy · 12min How Rory McIlroy won the Masters.
From a young prodigy, lapping the field with his driving to a wily veteran winning with his short game.
Credit to him for not only improving his weaknesses but maintaining his strengths. 1 567
